description: Automatically generate and send renewal reminders for vehicle licenses, registrations, roadworthiness certificates, and insurance policies before they expire.

actors.name: Fleet Manager
actors.description: Receives and acknowledges renewal reminders, takes action to renew

actors.name: System
actors.description: Daily scan that detects upcoming expiries and dispatches reminders

actors.name: Operations Supervisor
actors.description: Receives escalated overdue reminders when the fleet manager has not acted

values.name: upcoming
values.description: Expiry is beyond the advance notice window — no reminders yet

values.name: due_soon
values.description: Within the advance notice window; reminders are being sent

values.name: overdue
values.description: Due date has passed and renewal has not been completed

values.name: acknowledged
values.description: Assignee has confirmed they are working on the renewal

values.name: completed
values.description: Renewal was successfully completed before or after due date

values.name: waived
values.description: Reminder closed without renewal action (e.g., vehicle disposed)

transitions.description: Days until due_date falls below advance_notice_days threshold
Due date passed without acknowledgement or completion
Renewal document updated and completion recorded
Due date passed after acknowledgement without completion
Vehicle decommissioned or reminder no longer applicable

daily_scan.description: System runs a daily check to identify all renewal items where due_date minus today is less than or equal to advance_notice_days

reminder_frequency.description: A reminder notification is sent once per reminder_frequency_days until status is completed or waived

escalation_after_three.description: Overdue items are escalated to the operations supervisor after 3 unanswered reminders

overdue_transition.description: An item transitions to overdue when due_date has passed and status is not completed or waived

new_cycle_on_completion.description: Completing a renewal must supply a new due_date for the next cycle — a new reminder record is created automatically

reminder_types.description: Reminder types include at minimum: vehicle_license, registration_certificate, roadworthiness, insurance_policy

given: due_date minus today is less than or equal to advance_notice_days

then.description: Send reminder notification to assigned_to user

reminder_triggered.result: Assignee receives a notification with details of the upcoming expiry

given: today minus last_sent_date is greater than or equal to reminder_frequency_days
status is not completed or waived

then.description: Re-send reminder notification to assigned_to user

reminder_resent.result: Follow-up reminder is sent to the assignee

given: fleet manager confirms they are working on the renewal
reminder_acknowledged.result: Reminder status is updated and escalation clock is paused

given: status is acknowledged, due_soon, or overdue
new due_date for next cycle is provided

then.description: Create new upcoming reminder record for the next renewal cycle with updated due_date

renewal_completed.result: Current reminder is closed and a new reminder for the next cycle is created

given: number of reminders sent is greater than or equal to 3

then.description: Send escalation notification to operations supervisor

escalation_triggered.result: Operations supervisor is notified of the unactioned renewal

given: status is not completed or waived

then.description: Send overdue alert to fleet manager and operations supervisor

item_turned_overdue.result: Item is marked overdue and stakeholders are alerted

errors.message: Due date must be a valid future date.
A renewal reminder must have an assigned responsible person.

events.name: reminder.vehicle_renewal_triggered
events.description: A renewal reminder has entered the advance notice window and the first notification was sent

events.name: reminder.vehicle_renewal_completed
events.description: A renewal action was completed and a new reminder cycle was started

events.name: reminder.vehicle_renewal_overdue
events.description: A required renewal has not been completed by the due date

events.name: reminder.vehicle_renewal_escalated
events.description: Repeated unanswered reminders have triggered escalation to a supervisor

related.reason: Insurance policy expiry dates are a primary source of renewal reminders
Registration expiry dates trigger renewal reminders
Document expiry dates (permits, roadworthiness) are managed alongside renewal reminders
